query:
制作一个小红书的封面。
主题：GPT-image-2 也已经在 Lovart 平台上线了。
审美：高级杂志感。
要求：
1.有主题文字，GPT-image-2   和 Lovart。
2.使用对角线构图
3.高对比强调色

final_prompt.prompt:
制作一个小红书的封面。
主题：GPT-image-2 也已经在 Lovart 平台上线了。
审美：高级杂志感。
要求：
1.有主题文字，GPT-image-2   和 Lovart。
2.使用对角线构图
3.高对比强调色

Create a marketing poster (小红书 cover, 9:16) announcing that GPT-image-2 is now live on the Lovart platform, with a high-end editorial magazine aesthetic.

Style/medium: high-end editorial magazine cover, flat graphic design with bold typographic hierarchy, inspired by Vogue or Wired cover layouts
Composition: diagonal composition — key visual elements and text blocks arranged along a strong diagonal axis from bottom-left to top-right, dynamic tension, asymmetric balance
Subject: bold typographic lockup featuring "GPT-image-2" as the dominant headline and "Lovart" as the secondary brand name, with a supporting tagline about the platform launch
Scene/backdrop: clean, minimal abstract background that supports the diagonal layout — geometric shapes or color-block planes along the diagonal
Lighting/mood: flat graphic lighting, sharp edges, no soft shadows — editorial confidence and modernity
Color palette: high-contrast accent color (electric blue or vivid magenta) punching against a near-black or off-white base; accent color used selectively to create visual hierarchy, not scattered
Text (verbatim): "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart"
Constraints: text must be legible at mobile thumbnail size; diagonal layout must be visually intentional, not accidental; overall feel must read as premium magazine, not social media generic
Avoid: gradients that muddy contrast, drop shadows, stock-photo backgrounds, cluttered layouts, neon glow overuse, generic tech circuit textures

Use case: editorial-cover
Asset type: Xiaohongshu (小红书) cover image, 3:4 portrait
Primary request: high-end magazine-style cover announcing GPT-image-2 launch on Lovart platform, with diagonal composition and high-contrast accent colors
Scene/backdrop: abstract dark studio backdrop with bold diagonal graphic elements cutting across the frame
Subject: typographic-led layout featuring "GPT-image-2" as the hero headline and "Lovart" as secondary brand name, arranged along a strong diagonal axis
Style/medium: editorial graphic design, luxury magazine cover aesthetic, flat meets photographic texture
Composition/framing: diagonal composition — key text and visual elements aligned along a top-left to bottom-right diagonal axis, portrait orientation
Lighting/mood: dramatic, high-contrast lighting; deep shadows with sharp accent highlights; bold and commanding
Color palette: near-black background with one high-contrast accent color (electric cobalt blue or vivid crimson), white typography
Materials/textures: matte dark surface with subtle grain, glossy accent strokes along diagonal lines
Text (verbatim): "GPT-image-2" "Lovart"
Constraints: both brand names must be legible and prominently placed; diagonal layout must be visually dominant; maintain luxury editorial feel
Avoid: cluttered layout, pastel tones, drop shadows that look cheap, generic tech stock-photo clichés

format_runs.format_label: F9 任务句 + 字段表(中)

final_prompt.prompt:
为「GPT-image-2 已上线 Lovart」这一主题生成一张小红书封面海报，高级杂志感，科技与设计媒体调性。

风格/介质:高级时尚科技杂志封面，平面设计感强，参考 Wired 或 Wallpaper* 的排版美学，冷峻克制
构图:对角线构图，主视觉元素与文字沿左下至右上对角线分布，形成视觉张力，留白区域干净有呼吸感
主体:以「GPT-image-2」与「Lovart」为核心文字锚点，字体粗细对比强烈，大号无衬线主标题配细体副标题，文字本身即为视觉主体
场景/背景:纯色或极简几何背景，深色打底（深墨绿或哑光黑），配合对角线切割的色块分区
光线/氛围:无自然光源，依靠色彩对比与排版节奏营造张力，整体氛围冷峻、前沿、高饱和强调色点睛
色彩搭配:深色底色（深墨绿 / 哑光黑）作为主场，一个高饱和强调色（荧光黄绿或电光蓝）沿对角线做切割或描边，白色文字保证可读性，三色以内
文字(原文保留):"GPT-image-2" 与 "Lovart"
约束:文字「GPT-image-2」和「Lovart」必须在画面中清晰可读，不可变形或被遮挡；对角线构图必须明确可辨；强调色不超过一种
避免:渐变滥用、低对比度文字、居中对称平庸构图、过度装饰元素、网红滤镜感、廉价科技蓝紫渐变
